Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To First Set Of Special Interrogatories And First Set Of Documents Req.'S
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Ching-Ling Yao's Motion To Compel Responses To First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And First Set Of Document Requests is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion must be served and filed at least 16 court days in advance of the hearing, plus 5 days for mailing. This motion was filed on February 28, 2008. The first day this motion could have been heard is March 26, 2008. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
